home.title: Learn the skills that move your career forward
home.description: Hands-on courses taught by industry professionals. Study at your own pace, build real projects, and earn certificates that matter.

features.title: Everything you need to grow
features.subtitle: A complete platform built around how people actually learn.
features.expertDescription: Learn from professionals with real-world experience in their fields.
features.projectsDescription: Apply concepts immediately by building real projects from scratch.
features.paceDescription: Lifetime access lets you study whenever and wherever it fits you.
features.certificateDescription: Earn certificates you can share with recruiters and on LinkedIn.
features.communityDescription: Get support from fellow students and instructors in dedicated spaces.
features.supportDescription: Updates, new lessons and feedback from instructors as the field evolves.

cta.title: Ready to start learning?
cta.description: Join thousands of students already building the future of their careers.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

login.title: Login to your account
login.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Fill in the form below to create your account
signup.name: Full Name
signup.emailDescription: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
signup.passwordDescription: Must be at least 8 characters long.

courses.title: Courses
courses.loadError: Failed to load courses. Please try again.
courses.empty: No courses available at the moment.

courseForm.title: Title
courseForm.slugHint: Unique identifier used in URLs. Leave empty to regenerate from the title.
courseForm.thumbnailHint: Upload a cover image for the course.
courseForm.thumbnailReplaceHint: Current thumbnail shown above. Pick a new file to replace it.
courseForm.statusHint: Publishing a course for the first time sets its publish date automatically.
courseForm.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

courseCreate.title: Create a new course
courseCreate.description: Fill in the details below. You can change everything later.

courseEdit.title: Edit course
courseEdit.description: Update the course details. Owner-only action.

courseDetail.confirmArchive: Archive this course? It won't be publicly visible anymore.

sections.title: Course modules
sections.description: Organize the course into ordered modules.
sections.empty: No modules yet. Add the first one below.
sections.confirmDelete: Delete this module? Lessons inside it will also be deleted permanently.

lessons.empty: No lessons in this module yet.
lessons.confirmDelete: Delete this lesson? This cannot be undone.
lessons.fieldIsPreviewHint: Mark as visible to non-enrolled users.

questions.title: Quiz questions
questions.description: Manage the questions and answers for this quiz lesson.
questions.notQuizLesson: This lesson is not a quiz. Change its type to "quiz" to add questions.
questions.empty: No questions yet. Add the first one below.
questions.confirmDelete: Delete this question? Student answers referencing it will lose the option link.
questions.optionsHint: Pick the radio next to the correct option. 2 to 10 options allowed.
questions.errorOneCorrect: Mark exactly one option as correct.

authors.title: Authors
authors.description: Manage who can co-author this course.
